profile.name: Your Name
profile.title: AI-Assisted Data & Location Intelligence
profile.tagline: Data • Location Intelligence • AI-Assisted Workflow • Product Operations
profile.headline: I connect data, operations, and technology to build clearer insights and practical digital workflows.
profile.summary: I have experience in POI analysis, map data quality, routing issue investigation, geospatial data, field validation, and operational problem solving. My work has focused on turning messy real-world signals into structured insights, issue patterns, reports, and data quality improvements. I am currently expanding into AI-assisted development, Python, GenAI, LLMs, agents, RAG, and practical automation.
profile.contactHeadline: Open to roles where data, operations, product, and technology meet.
profile.contactText: I am interested in Data Analyst, Location Intelligence, Product/Data Operations, Technical Operations, AI-assisted workflow, and junior web/internal tools roles.

metrics.label: Years in data, GIS & operations
metrics.description: From geospatial database work to platform-level map data quality.

metrics.label: Strongest domain
metrics.description: Location data, routing issue analysis, and map quality validation.

metrics.label: Current growth path
metrics.description: GenAI, LLM, agents, RAG, Python, and AI-assisted workflow development.

roleFit.title: Data Analyst / Data Operations
roleFit.description: I work well with messy operational data, issue patterns, classification logic, reporting, root-cause analysis, and cross-functional validation.

roleFit.title: Location Intelligence / GIS
roleFit.description: My foundation is in GIS, spatial analysis, POI validation, routing issue analysis, map data quality, field survey, and geospatial database workflows.

roleFit.title: AI-Assisted Builder
roleFit.description: I am building toward AI-assisted workflows, vibe coding, and internal tools development by combining real operational problem solving with GenAI, LLM, agents, RAG, Python, and spec-driven learning.

projects.title: PAC-MAN — POI Category & Business Type Detection
projects.description: Worked on an internal data quality initiative used to detect POI category and business type from POI names and identify potentially incorrect POI attributes. This project reflects my interest in classification logic, validation rules, and practical data quality improvement.
projects.tools: Classification Logic, POI Validation, Data Quality, Operational Data

projects.title: Audio Protect Dataset Support
projects.description: Supported feature development by preparing and categorizing sample abusive words for Audio Protect. The work helped structure language patterns for feature testing, validation, and safety-related data preparation.
projects.tools: Dataset Preparation, Language Pattern, Feature Testing, Safety Data

projects.title: AI-Assisted Workflow & Vibe Coding Learning
projects.description: Completed internal and external learning in GenAI, LLMs, AI agents, RAG, vibe coding, Python, machine learning fundamentals, deep learning fundamentals, and spec-driven development. My goal is to apply this learning into practical tools, dashboards, data validation workflows, and automation.
projects.tools: GenAI, LLM, Agents, RAG, Python, Spec-Driven Development

experience.bullets: Analyzed POI, routing, and map data quality issues across Indonesia.|Investigated driver-submitted reports to identify POI inaccuracies, incorrect attributes, map gaps, or routing logic issues.|Collaborated with Driver-Partners, Product, Engineering, Operations, and external map providers.|Prepared map accuracy and issue trend reports to support operational decision-making.|Participated in internal AI training covering GenAI, LLMs, agents, RAG, vibe coding, and practical AI use cases.

Supported national priority research on drought model development for sustainable food estate management.|Processed Landsat 8 imagery using ArcMap and supervised classification methods.|Prepared and organized spatial data from multiple research teams for server integration.|Supported technical setup for GIS workstations, servers, and research tools.

Processed flood data with HEC-GeoRAS and HEC-RAS.|Managed survey planning and data preparation for Grab Street View projects.|Cleaned location-based GoPro photo data using QGIS.|Used Python-based scripts to support photo migration and deliverable workflows.

Managed production and procurement of public health materials during COVID-19 response projects.|Coordinated production timeline, item specifications, vendor communication, and delivery preparation.|Handled projects involving cloth masks, handwashing campaign banners, and prevention kit materials.
Managed procurement and production of public health and community campaign materials.|Supported vendor coordination, production monitoring, and administrative documentation.
Digitized PJT II assets from drone-captured imagery.|Inputted and validated asset attributes based on field survey data.|Conducted field surveys to complete asset mapping data.

Supported geospatial database migration and services for BIG Network Node project.|Migrated attribute data from KUGI V3 to KUGI V4.|Organized available geospatial data and ran Python scripts to support migration workflows.
Assisted lecturers in Quantitative Methods, Cartography, and Statistics classes.|Inputted questionnaire data for an employee satisfaction survey project.|Digitized land cover data for Serang, Banten.
